rootCause: Several process definitions, including arduino-thermistor-read used by geothermal/calibrate-ground-sensor, had empty createItems arrays, allowing process steps with no tangible output.
resolution: Added a process validation test requiring at least one created item per process, introduced a thermistor calibration record output for arduino-thermistor-read, backfilled a generic process completion note output for remaining empty-create processes, and updated geothermal quest/docs gates to require the calibration record.
